prompt: A bold minimalist brand poster on a matte black background with a soft grainy print texture, designed like a startup landing-page hero graphic. In the top left, place a simple cream-colored logo icon followed by the brand name Biscuit in a refined serif wordmark. Below it, create a large left-aligned typographic block occupying roughly the left half of the composition. The main headline reads: Built for solopreneurs. in oversized elegant cream serif type with strong contrast and generous line spacing. Directly beneath it, add a second headline line in vivid hot pink italic serif reading Backed by simplicity.. Below that, add a smaller white sans-serif body copy block, left aligned, reading Everything you need to launch, run, and grow—all in one place.. Near the bottom left, place the URL biscuit.so in bold hot pink sans-serif. On the right half, feature a cute abstract mascot: a rounded irregular cloud-like pink blob character with scalloped edges, 2 large cream-and-black circular eyes, 1 small curved smiling mouth, and 2 tiny rounded hands resting on top of a large curved pink foreground shape that rises from the bottom edge like a hill or product surface. Add a dense field of hot pink spray-like speckles and particles in the upper-right quadrant fading toward the center, giving a playful cosmic ink-splatter effect. Use a limited palette of black, cream, white, and saturated pink; high contrast editorial typography; lots of negative space; a clean, modern, approachable, founder-friendly SaaS branding aesthetic; centered-right character placement; portrait poster composition.
